login.title: Login
login.subtitle: Welcome back to Moeen Platform
login.promoDesc: An integrated charity and administrative system to empower and facilitate the work of charities, beneficiaries, and marketers with the highest standards of efficiency and security.

Landing.title: Moeen Digital Platform | Integrated System for Social Research & Charity Marketing
Landing.headline: Automating Social Research & Empowering Marketing Campaigns in One Platform
Landing.subheadline: An integrated cloud digital system allowing charity associations in KSA to instantly manage and store social research data, and generate smart marketing packages supporting decision-makers and marketers.
Landing.feature_1_desc: Upload and document social research forms in the field, saving them in a secure, locally compliant cloud database.
Landing.feature_2_desc: Read eligibility results and social indicators directly and smoothly to assist charity managers.
Landing.feature_3_desc: Generate and distribute marketing packages for social cases easily to increase fundraising efficiency.
Landing.contact_title: Start the Digital Transformation of Your Charity Now
Landing.contact_subtitle: Connect directly with the executive management team at Moeen Digital Trading Enterprise for integration and deployment.
